claims.summary: High-entropy codec scaling should be smooth and preserve the canonical 48D lane and reflective tail.
claims.disposition: Verified smoothstep boundary, 48D layout, tail support, finite bounds, and no-pop regressions.

claims.summary: Clamping and narrative overlap can flatten emotional and narrative distinctions.
claims.disposition: Verified separate narrative/emotional lane RMS, delta, headroom, precision, and compression-fidelity evidence; felt flattening remains an open empirical question.

claims.summary: The 0.84-0.89 scaling region and narrative/emotional cross-correlation should be compared directly.
claims.disposition: Routed as a bounded equal-input codec fixture with exact vectors and no live send.

claims.summary: Narrative dimensions should receive a distinct ceiling or damping rule.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because lane-specific ceiling or damping changes live codec gain and downstream sensory content.
